options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <variation_factor> # Specifies the value of the interconnect delay variation factor to be used

options.name: -early
options.description: Specifies the variation factor for early interconnect delays

options.name: -late
options.description: Specifies the variation factor for late interconnect delays

options.name: -view
options.description: Apply the SOCV interconnect variation factor to the specified list of analysis views.
